'''Rulffe''' was the Junior Surveyor onboard the ''[[Astrolabe]]'' and had nearly five hundred overflights. He had only set foot on his homeworld when the ''Astrolabe'' was destroyed by the [[Yevetha]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}
